mapper.insert:
/* insertWpasmaList */
INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.WPASMA( PASTRMD, PASTRNM, PASTRTG, PASTROD, PAUSEYN, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK ) VALUES( #{item.pastrmd}, #{item.pastrnm}, #{item.pastrtg}, #{item.pastrod}, #{item.pauseyn}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, 0 )
mapper.update:
/* updateWpasmaList */
UPDATE ${userInfo.schema}.WPASMA SET PASTRNM = #{item.pastrnm}, PASTROD = #{item.pastrod}, PASTRTG = #{item.pastrtg}, PAUSEYN = #{item.pauseyn}, LMODATE = date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userInfo.useract}, UPDTCHK = #{item.updtchk} + 1 WHERE PASTRMD = #{item.pastrmd}
mapper.insert:
/* insertWpashdList */
INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.WPASHD( WAREKEY, PASTRKY, PASTRNM, PAUSEYN, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK ) VALUES( #{item.warekey}, #{item.pastrky}, #{item.pastrnm}, #{item.pauseyn}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, 0 )
mapper.update:
/* updateWpashdList */
UPDATE ${userInfo.schema}.WPASHD SET PASTRNM = #{item.pastrnm}, PAUSEYN = #{item.pauseyn}, LMODATE = date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userInfo.useract}, UPDTCHK = #{item.updtchk} + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{item.warekey} AND PASTRKY = #{item.pastrky}
mapper.insert:
/* insertWpasitList */
INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.WPASIT( WAREKEY, PASTRKY, PASTRIT, PASTRMD, PASTRWG, PASTRST, PAESTYN, PAUSEYN, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK ) VALUES( #{item.warekey}, #{item.pastrky}, #{item.pastrit}, #{item.pastrmd}, #{item.pastrwg}, #{item.pastrst}, #{item.paestyn}, #{item.pauseyn}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, 0 )
mapper.update:
/* updateWpasitList */
UPDATE ${userInfo.schema}.WPASIT SET PASTRMD = #{item.pastrmd}, PASTRST = #{item.pastrst}, PASTRWG = #{item.pastrwg}, PAESTYN = #{item.paestyn}, PAUSEYN = #{item.pauseyn}, LMODATE = date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userInfo.useract}, UPDTCHK = #{item.updtchk} + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{item.warekey} AND PASTRKY = #{item.pastrky} AND PASTRIT = #{item.pastrit}
mapper.insert:
/* insertWpaordList */
INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.WPAORD ( WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, PASTRKY, PAUSEYN, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK ) VALUES( #{item.warekey}, #{item.doccate}, #{item.doctype}, #{item.pastrky}, #{item.pauseyn}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, 0 )
